title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Domino's India
jsonLd.description:
Domino's India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Domino's India:
Domino's India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India!
